emails.subject: Panther Pipeline, LTD
emails.body: Panther Pipeline, LTD Re; 0:/Legal?DHYVL/DJH/2001/Ltr/2001-005crfm.doc I just did a deal with Panther and I would use the same contract with this additional language. Period of Delivery: April 01, 2001 March 31, 2002 add that either party can terminate with 30 days written notice add evergreen language so the deal will roll after the one year term. Thanks, J Is the commodity price at Katy tail gate or HSC? It looks like the contract says both?
